allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:/Users/Vibha Beria/orchids-projects/Incentive-Management-software'' -Directory | ForEach-Object { $size = \(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; [PSCustomObject]@{Name=$_.Name; SizeMB=[math]::Round\($size/1MB,1\)} } | Sort-Object SizeMB -Descending | Select-Object -First 8")
